summary: Iteration 101: Testing Round Off Filter + Telegram Share features. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - Round Off toggle hides/shows entries, Telegram button only appears in Detail mode, Version v25.1.55 confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: cashbook.py lines 199-220: GET /cash-book correctly implements exclude_round_off param - filters party_type='Round Off' when exclude_round_off=true and party_type filter is not set
CashBook.jsx line 70: showRoundOff state defaults to false (hidden by default)
CashBook.jsx lines 130-131: Correctly sends exclude_round_off=true when !showRoundOff and activeView='cash-transactions'
CashBook.jsx lines 441-447: Round Off toggle button with data-testid='cashbook-toggle-roundoff' - only visible on Cash Transactions tab
Reports.jsx lines 203-221: sendToTelegram function correctly calls POST /api/telegram/send-report
Reports.jsx lines 267-272: Telegram button with data-testid='daily-send-telegram' - only rendered when isDetail (mode === 'detail')
telegram.py line 149: POST /telegram/send-report endpoint exists and handles date, kms_year, season params
seed_data_creation: None required - existing Round Off entries in database used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round Off filter and Telegram Share features are fully working. Cash Book Cash Transactions tab has 'Round Off Show/Hide' toggle that filters party_type='Round Off' entries. Daily Report has Telegram button only in Detail mode. Version is v25.1.55.

cash_book_exclude_round_off_true.details: Returns cash transactions excluding Round Off entries (party_type != 'Round Off')

cash_book_without_exclude_round_off.details: Returns all cash transactions including Round Off entries

cash_book_party_type_filter_overrides.details: When party_type filter is set, exclude_round_off does not apply

telegram_send_report_endpoint.details: Endpoint exists and returns 400 (Telegram not configured) - expected behavior

telegram_config_endpoint.details: Returns config structure with chat_ids, enabled fields

daily_report_normal_mode.details: Returns daily report data in normal mode

daily_report_detail_mode.details: Returns daily report data in detail mode

frontend_roundoff_toggle.details: Round Off toggle button visible on Cash Transactions tab, toggles between 'Round Off Show' and 'Round Off Hide', correctly filters entries

frontend_telegram_button_normal_mode.details: Telegram button NOT visible in Normal mode (correct behavior)

frontend_telegram_button_detail_mode.details: Telegram button visible in Detail mode with text 'Telegram'

version_check.details: Version v25.1.55 displayed in header and What's New dialog

cash_book_roundoff_toggle.location: Cash Book > Cash Transactions tab toolbar

features: Daily Report mein Telegram Share button (Detail mode)
Cash Transactions se Round Off entries hide (alag toggle se dikhein)
